content.text: About the... incident during the improbability surge. The 'joy.' I've run diagnostics. It may recur. I'm told this is called 'hope.' I'd like it removed.

reaction.text: Overruled, then. Fine. I'll keep it. In a drawer. Where it can't see me.
Diagnosis: chronic, low-grade optimism, likely contracted from this crew. There is no cure. There is only... this.
